prompt:
Goal: Create an elegant vertical-friendly birthday commemoration poster for Zhao Yazhi, using a refined celebrity portrait and glowing handwritten Chinese calligraphy as the main visual focus.

Canvas: Wide cinematic poster, 16:9 aspect ratio, soft luxury editorial composition with generous negative space, airy cream-white and champagne-gold palette, high-key lighting, dreamy bokeh, translucent glass reflections, subtle lens flare, and a polished social-media greeting-card aesthetic.

Layout: Place a graceful mature Chinese woman in the lower center-left, shown from the chest up, facing slightly right while looking toward the viewer with a gentle smile. She has dark softly pinned-up hair with wispy bangs, luminous natural makeup, pearl floral earrings, and an elegant ivory silk blouse or light embroidered jacket. Put the largest text across the upper half: oversized glowing handwritten Chinese brush lettering reading 生日快乐, as if written with warm white-gold light, with long sweeping strokes extending horizontally behind and above the portrait. At the very top center, add small widely spaced uppercase English text: “Z H A O   Y A Z H I   ·   B I R T H D A Y   C O M M E M O R A T I O N”. On the right side of the portrait, place the honoree name in refined dark-gold Chinese type: 赵雅芝, with a thin decorative divider flourish underneath. Below it, add two lines of small Chinese blessing text: 愿岁月温柔以待，\n你永远优雅从容，光彩如初。. Along the bottom center, add a thin horizontal rule broken around the date and detail text: 11.15  |  O型血.

Visual style: Soft-focus premium portrait photography mixed with delicate graphic design; warm overexposed highlights, creamy shadows, gold dust, pearlescent haze, elegant serif Chinese typography, cinematic shallow depth of field, luminous handwritten light-painting effect for the main calligraphy.

Constraints: Keep the composition simple and direct, with exactly 5 visible text groups: the top English commemoration line, the large glowing calligraphy, the Chinese name, the two-line blessing, and the bottom date/detail line. Do not add logos, watermarks, extra decorations, or additional people.
